case_title: RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC VS. DARRELL E WRIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, DARRELL E DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-27-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-28-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-12-2006
